zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline Basset於1228年出生在英國維爾爾伍頓 巴塞特時，她的父親Philip Basset Justiciar of England45歲，母親Hawise de Louvaine13歲。她於1244年之前與Hugh Le Despenser在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年4月11日在英國萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛享年53歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aline Basset于1228年出生在英国維爾爾伍頓 巴塞特时，她的父亲Philip Basset Justiciar of England45岁，母亲Hawise de Louvaine13岁。她于1244年之前与Hugh Le Despenser在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年4月11日在英国萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛享年53岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline Basset was born in 1228, in Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England, her father, Philip Basset Justiciar of England, was 45 and her mother, Hawise de Louvaine, was 13. She married Hugh Le Despenser before 1244, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 April 1281, in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline Basset est née en 1228, à Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Basset Justiciar of England, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Louvaine, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Le Despenser avant 1244, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1281, à Loughborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline Basset 1228 in Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Basset Justiciar of England 45 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Louvaine 13. Sie hat vor 1244 in England Hugh Le Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1281 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Basset è nata il nel 1228 nel Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Philip Basset Justiciar of England, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Louvaine, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Le Despenser prima del 1244, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 aprile 1281, nel Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Wiltshire, England.

ja.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャム

ja.lifeSummary: Aline Bassetが1228年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウットオン バセットで生まれた時，父Philip Basset Justiciar of Englandは45歳，母Hawise de Louvaineは13歳であった。1244年以前にイギリスでHugh Le Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年4月11日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウボロウで53歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline Basset(이)가 1228년 영국 윌츠히르 보턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Basset Justiciar of England(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Louvaine(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1244년 이전 영국에서 Hugh Le Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 4월 11일 영국 레이스스터실르 루그h버루에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Basset nasceu em 1228, em Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Basset Justiciar of England, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Louvaine, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Le Despenser antes 1244, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1281, em Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline Basset родилась в 1228 г. в местности вуттон бассетт, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Basset Justiciar of England было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Louvaine, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Le Despenser перед 1244 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 апреля 1281 г. в местности лоугбороую, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline Basset nació en 1228, en Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Basset Justiciar of England, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Hawise de Louvaine, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Hugh Le Despenser antes de 1244, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de abril de 1281, en Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
